tool_args.label: Grand opening of TRACKS Raw Bar and Grill at Grand Central Madison

payload.description: Grand opening of the iconic TRACKS Raw Bar and Grill at Grand Central Madison
Power outage at Grand Central Terminal caused by feeder failure; power restored to upper level within 20 minutes and rest of GCT 15 minutes later; no injuries; train service not interrupted

tool_args.label: Metro-North debuts new Siemens Charger locomotive

payload.description: Metro-North debuted the new Siemens Charger locomotive at Grand Central Terminal; delivered on time and on budget; manufactured by Siemens in their California facility; first two of thirty-three delivered ahead of schedule
Director of Operations Compliance and Procurement Daria Weible retired after 41 years of dedication at Metro-North

tool_args.label: LIRR accessible boarding pilot at Jamaica Station

payload.claim_text: President Free showcased a new pilot program that identifies accessible boarding areas on tracks 11 and 12 at Jamaica Station

tool_args.label: LIRR Grand Central Madison vs Penn Station split

payload.claim_text: The split between Penn Station and Grand Central Madison has consistently surpassed the 60-40 split and there are many days with 58-42 split

tool_args.label: GCT power outage had no impact on Grand Central Madison

payload.claim_text: President Free stated that the power outage had no impact on Grand Central Madison

tool_args.label: Shushil Ramnaess appointed VP of Rolling Stock at Metro-North

payload.claim_text: Metro-North President Justin Vonashek announced the appointment of Shushil Ramnaess as the new Vice President of Rolling Stock

The Laser Train has been upgraded with a refined laser optical system to clean hard-to-reach track segments. There is also a new process to measure rail contamination after cleaning to determine overall effectiveness.

Two trains will be added in response to increased ridership on the Harlem Line; a late evening train from Grand Central for return trips after a game or a show; the Leaf Peeper Train on the Hudson Line returns; Poughkeepsie Super Express Train includes five trains operating at under 90 minutes
The TRACKS program has been expanded to include a new virtual reality platform, including wrapped VR goggles, and is being expanded beyond schools

tool_args.label: Metro-North partnering with Rutgers University on AI

payload.claim_text: Metro-North is leveraging AI by partnering with Rutgers University across multiple areas of the railroad
Metro-North is expanding the Confidential Close Call Reporting System (C3RS)
There is a drone pilot program that deploys four drones used for emergency purposes. The OSCAR monitoring system integrates all the data and imagery from all forms, including drones.

tool_args.label: Bridge strikes decreasing year over year

payload.claim_text: Bridge strikes have been decreasing year over year, primarily as a result of bridge replacements that raise the clearance for vehicles, in addition to cameras, signage and beacon lights

payload.raw_value_text: thirty-three chargers
